author: llunerti
body:
#### PR description:
This PR is an updated version of https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/51317.

This PR is meant to address the issue #47275 for what concerns the missing parameters in the `fillDescriptions` implementation for the `MuonIdProducer` module.


#### PR validation:

Tested by running `runTheMatrix.py -l limited -i all --ibeos`

All tests are successfull with few exceptions. The following workflows 136.731, 136.793, 136.874 and 140.56 have failed with a fileOpen error similar to this [1]. In addition, the following workflows have failed with DAS_ERROR: 2022.0010001, 2023.0020001, 2024.0000001, 2024.0010001, 2024.0020001, 2024.0030001, 2024.0040001, 2024.0050001, 2024.0060001, 2024.0070001, 2025.0000002, 2025.0010001. 

[1]
```

   [1] Constructing input source of type PoolSource

      [d] XrdCl::File::Open(name='root://xrootd-cms.infn.it//store/data/Run2016B/SinglePhoton/RAW/v2/000/274/199/00000/166314A8-8426-E611-A242-02163E01375D.root?scitag.flow=206', flags=0x10, permissions=0660) => error '[ERROR] Server responded with an error: [3011] No servers are available to read the file.
```

title: Updating fillDescription in MUO-POG related modules (updated PR version)
